summary: Cargo tests completed successfully, but the log shows a QuickInstall download failed with HTTP 402 causing a fallback to a third-party source and a CI cache miss; one test was intentionally ignored due to a Linux regression.
root_cause: QuickInstall attempted to download cargo-cache-0.8.3 for aarch64 from https://warehouse-clerk-tmp.vercel.app but the request failed with HTTP 402 Payment Required, resulting in fallback to a third-party source and a cache miss.
relevant_tests: test result: ok. 824 passed; 0 failed; 3 ignored; 0 measured; 0 filtered out; finished in 4.77s

evidence.quote: Failed to send quickinstall report for package cargo-cache-0.8.3-aarch64-unknown-linux-musl: Failed to download from remote: could not HEAD https://warehouse-clerk-tmp.vercel.app/api/crate/cargo-cache-0.8.3-aarch64-unknown-linux-musl.tar.gz: HTTP status client error (402 Payment Required) for url (https://warehouse-clerk-tmp.vercel.app/api/crate/cargo-cache-0.8.3-aarch64-unknown-linux-musl.tar.gz)
evidence.reason: Shows the QuickInstall download explicitly failed with HTTP 402 Payment Required for the given URL.

evidence.quote: The package cargo-cache v0.8.3 (aarch64-unknown-linux-musl) has been downloaded from third-party source QuickInstall
evidence.reason: Indicates the package was retrieved from a third-party source as a fallback after the failed download.

evidence.quote: Cache does not exist using key setup-rustcargo-v1-linux-7c530854792d94f7b695674397a2fbe2abc9b540
evidence.reason: Indicates a CI cache miss, which may have triggered the download attempt.

evidence.quote: test commands::lint::fs_files_ignore_symlink ... ignored, It regresses on linux since we added the ignore crate, to understand why
evidence.reason: Documents that a test was intentionally ignored due to a known Linux regression after adding the ignore crate.

evidence.quote: test result: ok. 824 passed; 0 failed; 3 ignored; 0 measured; 0 filtered out; finished in 4.77s
evidence.reason: Shows the test run completed with no failures, indicating the log warnings (download/cache) did not cause test failures.

suggested_fix: Investigate and restore access to the QuickInstall host (https://warehouse-clerk-tmp.vercel.app) or resolve any payment/gating preventing HEAD/download (HTTP 402). Alternatively, ensure CI can use a known-good registry or populate the cache key 'setup-rustcargo-v1-linux-7c530854792d94f7b695674397a2fbe2abc9b540' to avoid remote downloads. Re-run the job after fixing access or restoring the cache.
